title: heliocarpus nodiflorus
intro: Heliocarpus nodiflorus, also known as the leafy heliotrope or floating heliotrope, is a small, aquatic plant that grows in shallow water and is native to Australia and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful for treating skin conditions, wounds, and infections. Its medicinal properties have been found to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antibacterial properties. Heliocarpus nodiflorus is typically prepared as an infusion or decoction, and it can also be used as a topical application in the form of a salve or cream.
